data.title: Add usage analytics dashboard
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `backend`, `analytics`

**Description:**
Add analytics to track usage, costs, and performance.

**Proposed Solution:**
Integrate Cloudflare Analytics and add custom metrics.

**Metrics to Track:**

* Request count per model
* Response time distribution
* Error rate
* Token usage
* Cost estimation
* Popular conversation topics (optional, privacy-aware)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Basic analytics logged to Workers Analytics
- [ ] Dashboard shows key metrics
- [ ] Cost estimation based on usage
- [ ] Performance metrics (p50, p95, p99)
- [ ] Privacy-preserving (no PII logged)

**Technical Considerations:**

* Use Workers Analytics Engine
* Add custom logging in Worker
* Create analytics dashboard endpoint
* Optional: Grafana/dashboard integration
* Consider privacy implications

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium-High** (analytics integration, metrics collection, dashboard UI)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium-High** (data collection, aggregation, visualization, privacy considerations)
* 💎 Value: **Medium** (valuable for monitoring and cost optimization, but not user-facing)
